title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App
scenario: Find My Device location permission dialog does not dismiss after granting "While Using the App" permission via phone settings
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding, selecting "Don't Allow" when prompted for location permission.
2. From the Home screen, navigate to App Settings.
4. Observe the location permission dialog that appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
6. In the phone system settings, grant the "While Using the App" location permission.
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The Find My Device screen is displayed and the location permission dialog is dismissed.
